doctrine: Deployment standardization is not authority over observations. It only removes deployment drift as an alternative explanation for future witness drift.
scope_guard: Did NOT start receipt-gate work (#5). Did NOT widen into live-adapter/TLS/Kea/pfSense comparator. Did NOT redeploy any host (fleet redeploy is gated, public blast radius).
method: read-only inventory across all three hosts (local systemctl --user on sushi-k; ssh read-only to NAS + VM). One zero-blast-radius convergence applied (VM git safe.directory).

sushi-k.note: on-disk nq-monitor rebuilt 2026-06-25 (newer, UNDEPLOYED); running process != on-disk binary

NAS.note: nq-witness byte-identical to sushi-k 6a8c443 build (scp provenance confirmed); ~30 stale nq.pre-* backups

key_findings: A (HIGH): fleet version identity incoherent — 6a8c443 / 6a8c443 / None+divergent-src(4ed7c6f). 6a8c443..b26c809 carries real code (gateway-path + declared-deny, +2523 lines), so running is code-stale vs HEAD. Acceptance criterion #1 FAILS.
A root cause: VM build_commit=None because /opt/notquery/src owned by jbeck, build runs as root, no git safe.directory -> build.rs git rev-parse hit dubious-ownership and unset NQ_BUILD_COMMIT.
B (MED): public reverse proxy is an UNMANAGED docker container (caddy:2), no systemd unit — reboot survival unverified.
C (MED): VM nq-monitor binds 0.0.0.0:9848 — may be reachable off-box bypassing caddy TLS; firewall UNVERIFIED.
D (LOW): VM runs as root, UMask 0022 vs private-host 0002 — standard undecided.
E (LOW): backup clutter on NAS+VM (~25-30 stale nq.pre-* + db backups).
applied: VM: git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/notquery/src (as root). BEFORE: dubious-ownership error / commit unreadable. AFTER: git rev-parse -> 4ed7c6f. Zero blast radius (no service touched). Reversible: git config --global --unset. EFFECT STAGED: running service still reports None until next rebuild.
gated_next_step: Coordinated build-per-host redeploy to a single canonical commit, fail-closed sushi-k->NAS->VM. Recommended canonical = b26c809 (HEAD): clean superset, on origin. VM src MUST be re-synced to canonical first (currently divergent 4ed7c6f); DO NOT rebuild VM as-is. Requires explicit operator go (public blast radius).
verification: read-only inventory; all three dashboards HTTP 200 + public 200 observed live. No host service mutated. The one applied change verified before/after.
acceptance: Phase 1 (inventory + contract) COMPLETE. Acceptance criterion #1 (same identity) deferred to the gated redeploy.
